title: sambucus ebuloides
intro: Sambucus ebuloides, also known as dwarf elder or lesser elder, is a shrub or small tree native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Sambucus ebuloides include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, and support the immune system. Sambucus ebuloides is often prepared as a decoction, tincture, or syrup, and its leaves and berries can be used to make teas, infusions, and topical applications for various health issues.
